response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned, versatile individual contributor with genuine distributed-systems chops (low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic) and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling via MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, this is an executive search: he has no CTO/VP/Director experience, no track record scaling an engineering organization from 10 to 30+ or developing a technical-leadership layer, no demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems with financial consequences, and no experience governing outsourced delivery partners. His fintech exposure (RIDE Capital) was as a senior developer, not an architecture or leadership owner. He fails most hard requirements for this role despite being a strong senior engineer.
strengths: Real distributed-systems and low-latency backend experience (microservices at millions of HTTP requests/sec, async I/O, caching)
Recent hands-on exposure to agentic-AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Long, polyglot engineering career with craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and community teaching
concerns: No executive or organizational leadership experience — never held CTO/VP/Head-of-Engineering roles or scaled teams 10→30+
No production multi-agent AI systems in regulated or high-stakes environments; agentic work is recent, tooling-level contribution
No evidence of LLM evaluation/fine-tuning depth, board-level communication, or governance of external delivery partners

key_factors.factor: Missing senior leadership / team-scaling track record
No production multi-agent AI systems experience
Strong distributed-systems and backend engineering depth
